Package i5.cb.graph

Class GraphInternalFrame

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.awt.Component
      • java.awt.Container
        • javax.swing.JComponent
          • javax.swing.JInternalFrame
            • i5.cb.graph.GraphInternalFrame
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ILangChangeable

    public class GraphInternalFrame
extends javax.swing.JInternalFrame
implements ILangChangeable
    This class'es instances are the windows inside the GraphEditor-Mainwindow
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      protected DiagramClass m_diagramClass
      The DiagramClass contains information about all components that are shown on this frame's DiagramDesktop.
      protected DiagramDesktop m_diagramDesktop
      Every GraphInternalFrame contains one single DiagramDesktop.
      protected IFrameWorker m_gifWorker
      This may be a thread running in background that is capable of providing info about its progress in the mainwindows progressbar
      protected GraphEditor m_graphEditor
      The GraphEditor that opened this frame.

      Makes sure that the DiagramClass is a completely empty DiagramClass.

      Tells this frame's m_gifWorker to restart.

      If you do not override this method in an application specific extension, nothing will happen.
      void setButtonEnabled​(java.lang.String sButton, boolean enabled)
      Defines wheter a certain toolbarbutton of the CBEditor is enabled when this gif is active Changes have instant effect if this gif is currently active.
      void setDiagramDesktop​(DiagramDesktop dd)
      Tells this frame which one is its diagramDesktop.

    • Field Detail

      • m_graphEditor

        protected GraphEditor m_graphEditor
        The GraphEditor that opened this frame.

      • m_diagramDesktop

        protected DiagramDesktop m_diagramDesktop
        Every GraphInternalFrame contains one single DiagramDesktop.

      • m_diagramClass

        protected DiagramClass m_diagramClass
        The DiagramClass contains information about all components that are shown on this frame's DiagramDesktop.

      • m_gifWorker

        protected IFrameWorker m_gifWorker
        This may be a thread running in background that is capable of providing info about its progress in the mainwindows progressbar

    • Constructor Detail

      • GraphInternalFrame

        public GraphInternalFrame​(GraphEditor ge,
                          java.lang.String sTitle)
        Creates a new JInternalFrame with the given title and size(500,460). Constructs the JScrollPane, the DiagramDesktop and the FrameIcon.
        Parameters:
        ge - The GraphEditor that owns this frame
        sTitle - a String value

    • Method Detail

      • setGelfile

        public void setGelfile​(java.lang.String filename)
        Sets the GEL filename of this GraphInternalFrame.
        Parameters:
        filename - : the new GEL filename

      • getGelfile

        public java.lang.String getGelfile​()
        Gets the GEL filename of this GraphInternalFrame.
        Returns:
        the durrent GEL filename

      • setDiagramDesktop

        public void setDiagramDesktop​(DiagramDesktop dd)
        Tells this frame which one is its diagramDesktop.
        Parameters:
        dd - a DiagramDesktop value

      • getDiagramDesktop

        public DiagramDesktop getDiagramDesktop​()

      • saveUserObject

        public void saveUserObject​(java.lang.Object uo,
                           java.io.ObjectOutputStream out)
                    throws java.io.IOException
        If you do not override this method in an application specific extension, nothing will happen. This is because the userObjects can be so different, that a general implementation is not possible.
        Parameters:
        uo - the userObject to be saved
        out - can be any ObjectOutput
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if an error occurs

      • loadUserObject

        public java.lang.Object loadUserObject​(java.io.ObjectInputStream in)
                                throws java.io.IOException,
                                       java.lang.ClassNotFoundException
        If you do not override this method in an application specific extension, nothing will happen. This is because the userObjects can be so different, that a general implementation is not possible.
        Parameters:
        in - must be a suitable ObjectInput
        Returns:
        an userObject if no error occured
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if an error occurs
        java.lang.ClassNotFoundException - if a necessary class was not found

      • finishedLoading

        public void finishedLoading​()
        Signals the frame that the loading is finished. If you do not ovverride this method in an application specific extension, nothing will happen.

      • finishedSaving

        public void finishedSaving​()
        Signals the frame that the saving is finished. If you do not ovverride this method in an application specific extension, nothing will happen.

      • pauseGifWorker

        public boolean pauseGifWorker​()
        Tells this frame's m_gifWorker to have a break
        Returns:
        a boolean value. This boolean is false iff this frame's m_gifWorker isn't instanciated
        See Also:
        IFrameWorker

      • stopGifWorker

        public boolean stopGifWorker​()
        Tells this frame's m_gifWorker to stop.
        Returns:
        a boolean value. This boolean is false iff this frame's m_gifWorker isn't instanciated

      • restartGifWorker

        public boolean restartGifWorker​()
        Tells this frame's m_gifWorker to restart.
        Returns:
        a boolean value. This boolean is false iff this frame's m_gifWorker isn't instanciated
        See Also:
        IFrameWorker

      • getFrameWorker

        public IFrameWorker getFrameWorker​()
        Returns this frame's m_gifWorker
        Returns:
        an IFrameWorker value
        See Also:
        IFrameWorker

      • setFrameWorker

        public void setFrameWorker​(IFrameWorker value)

      • updateLang

        public javax.swing.text.DefaultStyledDocument updateLang​(java.util.Locale loc)
        updates the language of this frame's DiagramClass and its m_gifWorker, if there is one.
        Specified by:
        updateLang in interface ILangChangeable
        Parameters:
        loc - the new locale
        Returns:
        always null at the moment

      • getGraphEditor

        public GraphEditor getGraphEditor​()

      • setGraphEditor

        public void setGraphEditor​(GraphEditor graphEditor)

      • getDiagramClass

        public DiagramClass getDiagramClass​()

      • resetDiagramClass

        public void resetDiagramClass​()
        Makes sure that the DiagramClass is a completely empty DiagramClass. If you write a subclass, you should override this method, to choose a more specific DiagramClass.

      • getStatus

        public java.lang.String getStatus​()
        Getter for property m_sStatus.
        Returns:
        Value of property m_sStatus.

      • setStatusString

        public void setStatusString​(java.lang.String status)
        Defines the statusstring of the CBEditor when this gif is active Changes have instant effect if this gif is currently active.

      • setButtonEnabled

        public void setButtonEnabled​(java.lang.String sButton,
                             boolean enabled)
        Defines wheter a certain toolbarbutton of the CBEditor is enabled when this gif is active Changes have instant effect if this gif is currently active.

      • setItemEnabled

        public void setItemEnabled​(java.lang.String sItem,
                           boolean enabled)
        Defines wheter a certain menuitem of the CBEditor is enabled when this gif is active Changes have instant effect if this gif is currently active.

      • setMenuEnabled

        public void setMenuEnabled​(java.lang.String sMenu,
                           boolean enabled)
        Defines wheter a certain menu of the CBEditor is enabled when this gif is active Changes have instant effect if this gif is currently active.

      • validateNodes

        public void validateNodes​()
        Validates all DiagramNodes on the active DiagramDesktop, i.e. do some application-specifict stuff to check if the nodes are still valid (in terms of the current app). This method does nothing
